meta.title: Vortexes Ltd. - Accessing the inaccessible
meta.description: Industrial rope access and commercial diving services for complex marine, underwater and difficult-access environments.

hero.title: Who We Are
hero.description: Vortexes is a premier industrial service provider specializing in high-risk access solutions. We bridge the gap between land and sea, offering elite expertise in Industrial Rope Access and Commercial Diving. Our mission is simple: to deliver precision engineering and maintenance services in environments where standard access is impossible.

above.title: Above
above.description: Industrial rope access for elevated structures and difficult-to-reach worksites.

below.title: Below
below.description: Commercial diving for underwater inspections, maintenance, and subsea operations.

beyond.title: Beyond
beyond.description: Integrated access solutions with precision, reliability, and strict safety control.

diving.title: Commercial Diving
items: Civil engineering and marine construction support

safety.title: Safety & Standards
safety.description: At Vortexes Ltd., safety is not just a policy, it is our foundation. We operate under the strictest international guidelines, ensuring that every project is risk-assessed and executed with zero-incident goals.

iso.healthSafety: ISO 45001:2018 occupational health and safety certification

projects.title: Past Projects

meta.title: Past Projects - Vortexes Ltd.
meta.description: Selected completed commercial diving, industrial rope access and marine operation projects by Vortexes Ltd.

projects.description: A selection of successfully completed projects across commercial diving, industrial rope access and marine operations.

nekHydroFacilities.title: NEK EAD
nekHydroFacilities.description: Repair and rehabilitation of hydrotechnical facilities: dam walls, HPP/PSHPP sites, water towers, pressure derivations, pipelines, siphons, canals and related infrastructure. The works include diving inspections, surveys, installation and dismantling activities, and repairs of intake and relief facilities, bottom outlets, screens, linings, joints, steel armor, injection works and other elements.
details: HPP Vacha II - diving inspection of the intake screen and gate valves of the Vacha II intake tower.
HPP Krichim - diving inspection of the intake screens and gate valves of the Krichim intake tower.
PSHPP Orpheus - diving inspection of intake screens HG1-HG4.

Industrial rope access inspections of pressure pipelines for HPP Aleko, HPP Byal Izvor, HPP Vacha 1, HPP Krichim, PSHPP Orpheus, HPP Vacha 2, HPP Devin, HPP Ustovo, HPP Peshtera, HPP Sestrimo, PSHPP Belmeken, PSHPP Chaira and HPP Momina Klisura.
Sealing and unsealing of a service gate in the intake tower of the headrace for HPP Teshel.
Water tower for the headrace of HPP Pasarel - structural safety survey and preparation of a working design, Iskar Reservoir.
Inspections of hydrotechnical facilities with specialized robotic equipment.
Repair of movable and fixed sealing contours of a repair gate at a bottom outlet and cleaning of rock mass in front of the screen at Lukovit Reservoir.
Underwater repair of drainage boreholes in the body of Chaira dam wall.
Underwater inspection of the bottom outlet at Golyam Beglik Reservoir.
HPP Tsankov Kamak - modernization of a flow measurement system in the pressure pipeline and installation of equipment by rope access.
Repair and restoration works on a pressure pipeline at HPP Peshtera by rope access.
Plugging a level gauge pipe and building a casing pipe for a level gauge at Krichim dam wall - design and execution.

dpusyaDamsOutlets.title: State Enterprise for Dam Management
dpusyaDamsOutlets.description: Repair and rehabilitation of hydrotechnical facilities. Diving services and construction works for improving and restoring the flow capacity of reservoir bottom outlets, sediment cleaning, replacement and repair of stop valves, fabrication and installation of screens, gate panels and bulkheads, construction works on intake, inlet and outlet shafts, and installation and removal of blanks.
details: Construction works to restore the discharge capacity of the bottom outlet at Omarski Geran - 441 Reservoir.
Construction works to improve the operating condition of the bottom outlet at Gorna Brestnitsa - 20 Reservoir.
Construction works to improve the operating condition of the bottom outlet at Blatata - 424 Reservoir.
Construction works to improve and restore the flow capacity of the bottom outlet at Golyam Varbovnik Reservoir.

teremNavalArsenal.title: TEREM - Naval Arsenal Shipyard, Varna
teremNavalArsenal.description: Underwater welding works, sealing breaches on floating vessels and facilities, ship docking, inspections, rehabilitation of slipways and other underwater construction works.

shipDivingOperations.title: Ship Diving Operations
shipDivingOperations.description: Diving inspections, marine growth cleaning, installation and dismantling of sea chest grids, bow thrusters, repair works on propeller-rudder groups, underwater vessel parts and other ship structures.

varnaRailFerryComplex.title: Varna Rail Ferry Complex
varnaRailFerryComplex.description: Diving inspection, dismantling and installation of marine fender systems related to rehabilitation, reconstruction and modernization of quay walls and adjacent infrastructure.

pristaOilHolding.title: Prista Oil Holding EAD
pristaOilHolding.description: Execution of rock armoring over a sand cushion at a base oils terminal berth in Navigation Canal No. 1, Varna.

plaschimT.title: Plastchim-T AD
plaschimT.description: Dismantling, installation and repair of valves in a water reservoir from the cooling system of a BOPP production line.

instituteOceanologyBas.title: Institute of Oceanology - BAS
instituteOceanologyBas.description: Light diving activity for a field experiment aimed at practical restoration of marine macrophytes under project N 101037097 REST COAST - Large scale RESToration of COASTal ecosystems through rivers to sea connectivity.

sofiaMunicipality.title: Sofia Municipality
sofiaMunicipality.description: Underwater inspection and restoration of the stop valve operation at Suhodol-2 Reservoir.

targovishteMunicipality.title: Targovishte Municipality
targovishteMunicipality.description: Restoration of the flow capacity of the bottom outlet at Vardun-2 Reservoir.
